song.title: Oh My God
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[v1] King of glory, oh my Jesus Christ Free me from what keeps me from Your life I can feel this heart beating inside I don't know when I felt more alive [c] Oh my God, my God Oh my God, my God [v2] Let us pass, oh Lord, from death to life Oh my God lead us into Your light Burning like a thousand suns at night We'll sing Your name until the end of time
[b] Born all over again Bring Your rain and bring Your wind I'm born all over Born all over again Death will lose and we will win I'm born all over
